languages.text: "Вот так бы сразу. Неужели не ясно, что к моим словам следует прислушиваться?"

traits.locale_text: "Вот так бы сразу. Неужели не ясно, что к моим словам следует прислушиваться?"

languages.text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"
languages.original_text: "Вот так бы сразу. Неужели не ясно, что к моим словам следует прислушиваться?"

traits.locale_text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"
"That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"
"That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"

languages.text: “你一开始就该这么回答。难道你还不清楚，我的话必须被听从吗？”
languages.original_text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"

traits.locale_text: “你一开始就该这么回答。难道你还不清楚，我的话必须被听从吗？”

languages.text: « Il était temps que vous vous décidiez à coopérer. Il me semble pourtant évident que je sais de quoi je parle ! »
languages.original_text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"

traits.locale_text: « Il était temps que vous vous décidiez à coopérer. Il me semble pourtant évident que je sais de quoi je parle ! »

languages.text: "Başından beri şunu demeni bekliyordum. Sözlerimin dikkate alınması gerektiği belli değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"

traits.locale_text: "Başından beri şunu demeni bekliyordum. Sözlerimin dikkate alınması gerektiği belli değil mi?"

languages.text: «Esa debería haber sido su respuesta desde el principio. ¿No es evidente que mis palabras han de acatarse?».
languages.original_text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"

traits.locale_text: «Esa debería haber sido su respuesta desde el principio. ¿No es evidente que mis palabras han de acatarse?».

languages.text: "Das hätte von Anfang an Eure Antwort sein sollen. Ist nicht klar, dass niemand auf mich hört?"
languages.original_text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"

traits.locale_text: "Das hätte von Anfang an Eure Antwort sein sollen. Ist nicht klar, dass niemand auf mich hört?"

languages.text: 「最初からそう答えるべきだった。私の言葉は聞くべきだと、おわかりではないのか」
languages.original_text: "That should have been your answer from the off. Is it not clear that my words are to be heeded?"

traits.locale_text: 「最初からそう答えるべきだった。私の言葉は聞くべきだと、おわかりではないのか」
